description_long: This is a double-bit axe featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish. The head is made of dark metal and has two symmetrical, broad cutting edges, each with a slightly convex profile. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, with the handle securely fitted through the eye of the axe head. The metal head appears robust and well-forged, with a matte to semi-gloss finish that suggests durability and resistance to corrosion. The handle is ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, tapering slightly towards the end. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A double-bit axe with a long, curved wooden handle and a robust, dark metal head featuring two symmetrical cutting edges. The handle is smooth and natural, while the head is matte and durable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and both cutting edges of the double-bit metal head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the axe head and the circular cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the handle and both cutting edges visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the alignment of the handle with the head and the symmetry of the double-bit blade.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish, oval cross-section, and ergonomic grip; slightly tapered towards the end.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bit design with two symmetrical, broad, convex cutting edges; no beard or poll; robust and functional geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle fitted through the eye of the axe head.
